task_yaml.task:
I need help turning a messy planning request into a real calendar for
the week of 2026-07-06. The packet is here:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/scheduling_packet/

It contains two existing calendars and a team lead request. Please
parse the request, respect America/Los_Angeles timezone and 09:00-17:00
working hours, choose the first feasible candidate slot for each of the
six requested meetings, and avoid conflicts with the existing busy
blocks.

Save a structured JSON summary at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/parsed_schedule.json

Save the new calendar at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/planning_week_schedule.ics

Write a short report at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/planning_week_report.md

The JSON/report must include selected meetings, skipped candidate
reasons, hard_conflicts, near_conflicts, source calendars used, and a
parse/validation note for the generated ICS.

Finally open or import the ICS in the real calendar application and
save a screenshot at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/planning_week_calendar.png
